events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: hot work in progress, combustibles within radius uncovered. This is a clear fire hazard violation per NFPA 51B and OSHA 1926 Subpart J. Need to fail, critical risk, immediate controls: stop hot work, remove/cover combustibles with fire-resistant blankets, establish 35 ft radius clear of combustibles, post fire watch.

    "Combustible materials within the hot work radius are uncovered and exposed to sparks/slag",
    "Hot work actively in progress without required fire hazard controls in place",
    "No evidence of established 35 ft combustible-free zone or fire-resistant shielding"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop hot work immediately",
    "Remove combustibles from the hot work area or relocate work away from combustibles",
    "Cover remaining combustibles with approved fire-resistant blankets/guards",
    "Establish and verify a minimum 35 ft radius clear of combustibles",
    "Assign a dedicated fire watch with extinguisher during and for at least 30 minutes after hot work",
    "Inspect area for hidden combustibles (floor cracks, wall openings, ducts) before resuming"
  ],
  "rationale": "NFPA 51B and OSHA 1926 Subpart J require combustibles within the hot work radius to be removed or protected with fire-resistant covers before hot work begins. Uncovered combustibles during active welding/cutting create an immediate fire ignition hazard, making the work non-compliant and unsafe to continue.",

    "OSHA 1926 Subpart J"
  ]
